markdownRemark.html:
This site was built with Gatsby.

I finally decided to take the plunge into "modern web development" after hearing good things about Gatsby and static site generators. I've also wanted to build my portfolio website and deploy it onto Github Pages--which only serves static resources.

And it has been a wild rabbit hole...

Having gone through Gatsby's tutorial, I've setup a JAM stack for blogging and markdown rendering purposes mostly.

Here are some useful links about Gatsby:

  • Motivation
  • Lifecycle
  • Data layer

frontmatter.title: Foray into Front-end Development with Gatsby
